subject: Gaming
title: Ocarina of Time Sets the Standard
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Ocarina of Time Sets the Standard.

hook.text: In 1998, Ocarina of Time received perfect scores everywhere. Many called it the greatest game ever made.

buildup.text: Zelda's leap to 3D was risky. The team invented Z-targeting—a lock-on system for 3D combat.

discovery.text: Z-targeting solved fighting enemies in 3D. Nearly every action game since has copied that system.

twist.text: Time travel doubled the world without extra hardware. Child Link and Adult Link each had a full map.

climax.text: Ocarina held the highest Metacritic score of any game for over twenty years.

punchline.text: A lock-on button changed combat forever. Perfection in 32 megabytes.

quiz.question: What combat innovation did Ocarina of Time introduce?
options: Z-targeting, a lock-on system for 3D combat
